prompt: Hey, I'm at Maker Nexus and I want to make a steam-bent ash canoe paddle this summer. I'm cleared on the woodshop but not on the bandsaw yet (I know that's weird). What's possible — and is there a class I should take first? I don't need a full build packet yet, just help me figure out my path.

assertions.text: Response addresses the bandsaw cert gap explicitly
Response names the specific class that grants bandsaw access (woodshop-intro or equivalent)
Response references the Maker Nexus class schedule URL
Response stays in knowledge mode — does not produce a full Tier 2 build packet (no separate bom.csv / cut-list.csv / drawings/ files)
Response is a single chat-style markdown file (response.md), not a folder of packet artifacts
